terms: ## Hard Gate
do not start substantial planning, implementation, debugging, or review until startup loading is complete
Read `manifest.md` if present.
Read `brief.md` before substantial work.
Load only files allowed by the manifest
Never load `archive/` unless the user explicitly asks
Do not load `inbox.md` unless compacting
keep platform entry files such as `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, and `GEMINI.md` short
Write durable memory only when it is project-level
curate it from authoritative project files
Keep `brief.md` about the project, not MemoryCustodian.
Classify scope before content type.
reserve root `decisions.md` for cross-cutting choices
matched `areas/*.md`
Treat decision compaction as semantic maintenance, not chronological trimming.
Retain every active invariant
Keep each decision entry at or below 120 tokens
Never truncate mechanically; rewrite semantically.
Use `--allow-long` only when splitting would lose essential decision semantics.
Preview the complete semantic-unit plan before writing.
Remove whole H2 entries or top-level bullets
hard and purge records stay generic
